content.full_text:
State of California Fair Political Practices Commission

P.O. BOX 807 · SACRAMENTO, 95804 ·· 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance •• Administration •• Executive/Legal •• Enforcement •• Statements of Economic Interest
(916) 322-5662        322-5660        322-5901        322-6441        322-6444

July 16, 1981

Jim McCann, Chief
Labor Relations Bureau
DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL SERVICES
744 P Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Request for Interim Approval of Non-Substantive Alteration of Conflict of Interest Code

Dear Mr. McCann:

Mr. Prim has directed me to respond to your request, received by this office June 17, 1981. The Executive Director hereby grants interim approval of your request for non-substantive alteration to add two job classifications to the list of designated employees as shown on the copy of your code attached to your letter.

This approval is granted pursuant to our regulation, 2 Cal. Adm. Code §18752(c) and (d)(4). Pursuant to a Cal. Adm. Code §18752(f), the Department will have to adopt this alteration as an amendment by January, 1982, and submit it to the Commission for formal approval.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Robert E. Leidigh
Counsel
Legal Division

RL:gs
